entries.lean_statement:
theorem prop_eppa1 {V : Type*} [Fintype V] (G : SimpleGraph V) (w : V → V → ℝ) (hG : ∀ x y, 0 < w x y) :
    ∃ (H : SimpleGraph V) (w' : V → V → ℝ) (hH : ∀ x y, 0 < w' x y),
      (∀ x y, G.Adj x y ↔ H.Adj x y) ∧
      (∀ f : V → V, (∀ x y, G.Adj x y ↔ H.Adj (f x) (f y)) → ∃ g : V → V, (∀ x y, G.Adj x y ↔ H.Adj (g x) (g y)) ∧ ∀ x, f x = g x) ∧
      (∀ x y, G.Adj x y → w x y = w' x y)

semantic_equivalence_artifact.original_latex_theorem:
\label{prop:eppa1}
For every finite $\mathbb R^{>0}$-edge-labelled graph $\mathbf {A}$ there exists a finite 
$\mathbb R^{>0}$-edge-labelled graph $\mathbf {B}$ containing $\mathbf {A}$ as an induced subgraph such
that every partial automorphism of $\mathbf {A}$ extends to an automorphism of
$\mathbf {B}$.
semantic_equivalence_artifact.normalized_natural_language_theorem: Quantifiers: For every; there exists Conclusion: $\mathbf {B}$ contains $\mathbf {A}$ as an induced subgraph and every partial automorphism of $\mathbf {A}$ extends to an automorphism of $\mathbf {B}$

theorem prop_eppa1 {V : Type*} [Fintype V] (G : SimpleGraph V) (w : V → V → ℝ) (hG : ∀ x y, 0 < w x y) :
    ∃ (H : SimpleGraph V) (w' : V → V → ℝ) (hH : ∀ x y, 0 < w' x y),
      (∀ x y, G.Adj x y ↔ H.Adj x y) ∧
      (∀ f : V → V, (∀ x y, G.Adj x y ↔ H.Adj (f x) (f y)) → ∃ g : V → V, (∀ x y, G.Adj x y ↔ H.Adj (g x) (g y)) ∧ ∀ x, f x = g x) ∧
      (∀ x y, G.Adj x y → w x y = w' x y)
